title: Module 1 Project: Inventory Correction and Cleanup
summary: Correct audited inventory values and remove only two approved test records through six cumulative steps.

sketchBlocks.title: Inventory Correction and Cleanup Project
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown: In this project, you will take on the role of an Inventory Data Steward. Your task is to correct and clean up the inventory database based on a recent audit. The audit identified incorrect prices, unfinished statuses, and internal test rows that need to be addressed. Your goal is to create a SQL script that precisely updates and deletes records as per the audit findings, ensuring that only the intended changes are made. This project will guide you through a series of steps to achieve a clean and accurate inventory database.

quizDraft.title: Preview the Audit Targets
quizDraft.prompt: Write a SELECT statement to preview the inventory items with ids 2, 4, and 6. Include columns for price, status, is_test, and notes.
quizDraft.starterCode: -- Write a query that satisfies the exercise prompt.

quizDraft.title: Correct One Item Precisely
quizDraft.prompt: Update the inventory item with id 2 to set the price to 8.25 and status to 'active'. Ensure you use a WHERE clause to target only this item.

quizDraft.title: Apply a Controlled Category Update
quizDraft.prompt: Update all non-test Decor items to set last_updated to '2026-02-10'. Ensure you preserve earlier work and use a WHERE clause to target only non-test Decor items.
